title: arisarum simorrhinum subsp. subexertum
intro: Arisarum simorrhinum subsp. subexertum, also known as the European cattail arum, is a plant species within the Arum family (Araceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Arisarum simorrhinum subsp. subexertum is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or dried herb for its medicinal use.
